play_store_reviews.text: Changed the Facebook settings so it couldn't see my friend list now it won't let me use the app as it says I need at least 10 Facebook friends and won't let me go back and change the settings. Why does it need to be linked to fb in the first place and why does it need to see my friend list!?
Great idea but simply kept crashing on my phone. After numerous attempts have given up...
Can't comment as don't do Facebook which it expects you to, so pointless to me.

Well it works well now, in fact it's completely different, as previous attempt failed.  But after your updates it's perfect.  Working on my Doogee Dagger DG550 without a hitch.  Also tried on Samsung S2 with good results. It's easy to use,  very informative,  covers all governmental subjects, very well organised. Many thanks.  Certainly helps to make a decision.
Why are some apps Facebook reliant? I, as many others do not have Facebook so I cannot use this app. Great way to alienate so many people right before an important election.
I don't have or want a Facebook account so I don't get to use this app.

Didn't want my Facebook friends bombarded so declined on the set-up page then it wouldn't let me do anything else. Kept saying i had to have at least 10 facebook friends. I uninstalled to try again and it remembered the settings. Real shame as I've been told this app is really good and it was a recommendation from my daughter
Why do i need a Facebook account for British politics? Shame. I was really hoping that this could have helped me decide. Uninstalled.
Clever app , loved the simplicity and learned important policy in a fun way. Finally politics is in the 21st century
